F7.9. 5120 (), ara 3 srqae, 2018 # fwferfaa HL FAT 2, AITT- T ATAAT F ATATE 11 § “Fg A A sty F o awd@ F e w7 430 97, 2019 7%A Irafer 3 forn” oreq, st T &A% T S0 | [, /. #1-18011/13/2000-#f (wr£)] Farer e fie, @ afea feoqur . g stfereAT, WA F TS, ST § @i w1 93(3), AT 3 srFgae, 2018 F arer 2T ¥ TE oA 2262 GI/2019 (03] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE ORDER New Delhi, the 25th April, 2019 S.0. 1651(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 5120(E), dated the 3" October, 2018, namely:- In the said notification, in paragraph 11, for the words “for a period of six months”, the words, figures and letters “for a period upto 30" June, 2019 shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-18011/13/2000-CPA (Pt.)] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.0. 93 (E), dated 3" October, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
